step_4_last_10_srt_segments.sample: 00:08:27,520 --> 00:08:32,560 → 'You can create sinking funds for anything. Car maintenance...'
00:08:32,560 --> 00:08:37,360 → 'These are the budget categories that protect you...'
00:08:37,360 --> 00:08:43,200 → 'Let me give you a real example so this feels concrete...'
00:08:43,200 --> 00:08:48,720 → 'Let us say you bring home four thousand dollars...'
00:08:48,720 --> 00:08:55,040 → 'Rent, twelve hundred dollars. Car payment, three hundred...'
00:08:55,040 --> 00:09:16,159 → 'Add all of that up and you get four thousand dollars...'
00:09:16,159 --> 00:09:21,199 → 'We put out videos every week on budgeting, investing...'
00:09:21,199 --> 00:09:26,159 → 'And if you are serious about leveling up your finances...'
00:09:26,159 --> 00:09:31,039 → 'miss an upload. Your future self is going to thank you...'
00:09:31,039 --> 00:09:41,039 → 'building your first zero-based budget. Let us get to work.'

step_5_integrated_into_audio_agent.integration_point: After normalise_audio() and update_task(done), before send_telegram
step_5_integrated_into_audio_agent.trigger: Runs automatically for any task with episode number
features: Subprocess call to generate_srt.py with episode argument
Error handling: logs warnings on failure, does not block task completion
Parallel logging to avoid blocking send_telegram

next_ep2_steps: 2. Animation Agent renders Manim scenes synced to audio + SRT
3. Upload Agent posts final video to YouTube
